transcript: Nigga, I be spiked out, I could trip a referee Tell by my attitude that I'm most definitely from New York I'm beatin' up with dreams I'm made of There's nothin' you can't do Now you're in New York These streets will make you feel brand new These lights will inspire you Let's hear it for New York
